seo.title: Data Coaching - Yordan Ivanov
seo.description: 1-on-1 for mid and senior data professionals. Stakeholder communication, promotion business cases, and the non-technical side of the job.

sections.title: You're good at your job and deserve more.
sections.subtitle: I've spent nine years managing data teams and helping people through exactly what you're stuck on, whether that's stakeholder conversations, promotion strategy, or making your work count beyond the pipeline.

sections.title: The Problem
sections.content: You can build the pipeline, design the architecture, and fix the production incident at 2am. But when it's time to present to the VP, make the case for headcount, or explain why your promotion is overdue, you go quiet. Technical skill got you here. It won't take you further.

items.title: Stakeholder Communication
items.description: How to walk into a meeting with non-technical leadership and land your point. We work on structure, framing, and confidence so you stop leaving meetings thinking 'I should have said that differently.'

items.title: Promotion Business Cases
items.description: Most data people wait to be noticed. We build an actual case: impact framed in business terms, a clear narrative for your manager, and a strategy for making it happen on your timeline.

items.title: Data Strategy & Roadmaps
items.description: How to think beyond the next sprint. We work on building a roadmap that connects your technical work to what the business actually cares about: revenue, cost, and risk.

items.title: Working Without a Playbook
items.description: Managing up, saying no to stakeholders, figuring out what 'being strategic' actually means at your level. Nobody teaches this. We work through the situations that don't have a right answer in the documentation.

sections.title: 30 minutes. No pitch.
sections.description: Book a discovery call. Tell me what you're stuck on. If I can help, I'll tell you how. If I can't, I'll tell you that too.

sections.heading: What people say about my work
sections.quote: I highly recommend Yordan, he is an absolute pleasure to work with and I've not yet seen a problem that he can't solve. Yordan is also so generous with his knowledge, always taking the time to explain the best way of doing something or the merits of a range of options.
sections.author: Katy Beckett, Analytics Manager

sections.quote: I found very helpful one of the communication playbooks that I applied and successfully delivered at work: first the benefits of the solution, next the pain the said solution mitigated or eliminated, and only then the solution details. It builds a nice narrative and really levels up!
sections.author: Thiago Olivera, Principal Data Engineer

sections.quote: Your content fills the gap between business value and technical skills and knowledge required to be a good data engineer, which is something that I always look for and is not easy to find.
sections.author: Filipe Balseiro, Lead Data Engineer
